---
title: "Wu Jiayan"
subtitle: "Data Science & Analytics | Singapore Management University"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
  /* ── Reset Quarto page chrome ── */
  #quarto-content { padding: 0; }
  .page-layout-full .column-page { max-width: 100%; padding: 0; }

  /* ── Design tokens ── */
  :root {
    --accent:    #2563a8;
    --accent-lt: #e8f0fb;
    --text:      #1a1a2e;
    --muted:     #6b7280;
    --border:    #e5e7eb;
    --card-bg:   #ffffff;
    --radius:    12px;
    --shadow:    0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.08);
  }
  [data-bs-theme="dark"] {
    --accent:    #5b9bd5;
    --accent-lt: #1e2d45;
    --text:      #e2e8f0;
    --muted:     #94a3b8;
    --border:    #2d3748;
    --card-bg:   #1e2535;
  }

  body { color: var(--text); }

  /* ── Hero ── */
  .hero {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1b2a4a 0%, #2563a8 100%);
    color: #fff;
    padding: 80px 40px 72px;
    text-align: center;
  }
  .hero-avatar {
    width: 140px; height: 140px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    border: 4px solid rgba(255,255,255,.4);
    object-fit: cover;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    display: block;
    margin-left: auto;
    margin-right: auto;
    transition: transform .2s, box-shadow .2s;
  }
  .hero-avatar:hover {
    transform: translateY(-3px) scale(1.02);
    box-shadow: 0 10px 28px rgba(0,0,0,.28);
  }
  .profile-link { display: inline-block; text-decoration: none; }
  .hero h1 { font-size: 2.6rem; font-weight: 700; margin: 0 0 8px; }
  .hero .tagline {
    font-size: 1.1rem; opacity: .85; margin: 0 0 28px;
    max-width: 560px; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;
  }
  .hero-badges { display: flex; gap: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: center; margin-bottom: 32px; }
  .badge-pill {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,.18);
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.3);
    border-radius: 999px;
    padding: 5px 16px;
    font-size: .85rem;
    backdrop-filter: blur(4px);
  }
  .hero-cta {
    display: inline-block;
    background: #fff; color: #2563a8;
    font-weight: 600; font-size: .95rem;
    padding: 11px 28px; border-radius: 8px;
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: transform .15s, box-shadow .15s;
  }
  .hero-cta:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.2); }

  /* ── Section chrome ── */
  .section { padding: 64px 40px; max-width: 1100px; margin: 0 auto; }
  .section-title {
    font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--accent);
    border-left: 4px solid var(--accent);
    padding-left: 14px;
    margin-bottom: 32px;
  }

  /* ── Project grid ── */
  .project-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(300px, 1fr));
    gap: 24px;
  }
  .project-card {
    background: var(--card-bg);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: var(--radius);
    box-shadow: var(--shadow);
    overflow: hidden;
    display: flex; flex-direction: column;
    transition: transform .2s, box-shadow .2s;
  }
  .project-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 10px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.12); }
  .card-header-band {
    height: 6px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, #2563a8, #5b9bd5);
  }
  .card-body { padding: 22px 24px; flex: 1; }
  .card-category {
    font-size: .75rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: .06em;
    text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--accent);
    margin-bottom: 8px;
  }
  .card-title { font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 700; margin: 0 0 10px; }
  .card-desc { font-size: .9rem; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.6; margin: 0; }
  .card-footer-row {
    padding: 14px 24px;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
    display: flex; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center;
  }
  .tag {
    background: var(--accent-lt);
    color: var(--accent);
    font-size: .75rem; font-weight: 500;
    padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 999px;
  }
  .card-link {
    margin-left: auto;
    font-size: .85rem; font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--accent); text-decoration: none;
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px;
  }
  .card-link:hover { text-decoration: underline; }

  /* ── Skills ── */
  .skills-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(200px, 1fr));
    gap: 20px;
  }
  .skill-group { }
  .skill-group-title {
    font-size: .8rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: .08em;
    text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--muted);
    margin-bottom: 10px;
  }
  .skill-tags { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 7px; }
  .skill-tag {
    background: var(--accent-lt);
    color: var(--accent);
    font-size: .8rem;
    padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 6px;
  }

  /* ── Divider ── */
  .section-divider { border: none; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); margin: 0 40px; }

  /* ── Footer ── */
  @media (max-width: 600px) {
    .hero h1 { font-size: 1.9rem; }
    .project-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  }
</style>

<!-- ══════ HERO ══════ -->
<div class="hero">
  <a class="profile-link" href="Resume/" aria-label="View Wu Jiayan's resume" title="View resume">
    <img class="hero-avatar" src="photo.jpg" alt="Wu Jiayan">
  </a>
  <h1>Wu Jiayan</h1>
  <p class="tagline">
    Master of IT in Business (Data Science & Analytics)<br>Singapore Management University
  </p>
  <div class="hero-badges">
    <span class="badge-pill">🤖 Machine Learning</span>
    <span class="badge-pill">📊 Visual Analytics</span>
    <span class="badge-pill">💹 Financial Data Science</span>
    <span class="badge-pill">📐 Statistical Modelling</span>
  </div>
  <a class="hero-cta" href="#projects">View Projects ↓</a>
</div>

<!-- ══════ PROJECTS ══════ -->
<div class="section" id="projects">
  <div class="section-title">Projects & Coursework</div>
  <div class="project-grid">

    <!-- Card 1 -->
    <div class="project-card">
      <div class="card-header-band"></div>
      <div class="card-body">
        <div class="card-category">Visual Analytics and Applications</div>
        <div class="card-title">Interactive Visual Analytics Application</div>
        <p class="card-desc">A deployed visual analytics website presenting interactive exploration and data-driven storytelling.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="card-footer-row">
        <span class="tag">Visual Analytics</span>
        <span class="tag">Interactive App</span>
        <a class="card-link" href="https://isss-608-vaa-iota.vercel.app/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Visit website →</a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Card 2 -->
    <div class="project-card">
      <div class="card-header-band"></div>
      <div class="card-body">
        <div class="card-category">Applied Machine Learning</div>
        <div class="card-title">HDB Resale Price Forecasting</div>
        <p class="card-desc">Leakage-aware future price forecasting using tuned baseline models and an optimized stacking ensemble.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="card-footer-row">
        <span class="tag">Scikit-learn</span>
        <span class="tag">Python</span>
        <a class="card-link" href="Projects/Applied Machine Learning/">View report →</a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Card 3 -->
    <div class="project-card">
      <div class="card-header-band"></div>
      <div class="card-body">
        <div class="card-category">Data Science for Business</div>
        <div class="card-title">Airbnb Dynamic Pricing</div>
        <p class="card-desc">A booking-probability and expected-revenue engine that recommends date-specific nightly prices.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="card-footer-row">
        <span class="tag">Random Forest</span>
        <span class="tag">Optimization</span>
        <a class="card-link" href="Projects/Data Science for Business/">View report →</a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Card 4 -->
    <div class="project-card">
      <div class="card-header-band"></div>
      <div class="card-body">
        <div class="card-category">Financial Services</div>
        <div class="card-title">AI Trade Surveillance</div>
        <p class="card-desc">Comparison of keyword screening and contextual AI analysis for misconduct detection in trading communications.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="card-footer-row">
        <span class="tag">Compliance</span>
        <span class="tag">LLM</span>
        <a class="card-link" href="Projects/Data Science for Financial Service/">View report →</a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Card 5 -->
    <div class="project-card">
      <div class="card-header-band"></div>
      <div class="card-body">
        <div class="card-category">Query Processing</div>
        <div class="card-title">Full-Text Index Optimisation</div>
        <p class="card-desc">A MySQL benchmark comparing FULLTEXT indexing with wildcard LIKE searches on Airbnb listing text.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="card-footer-row">
        <span class="tag">MySQL</span>
        <span class="tag">Benchmarking</span>
        <a class="card-link" href="Projects/Query Processing and Optimisation/">View report →</a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Card 6 -->
    <div class="project-card">
      <div class="card-header-band"></div>
      <div class="card-body">
        <div class="card-category">Spreadsheet Modelling</div>
        <div class="card-title">Singapore Water Sufficiency</div>
        <p class="card-desc">Forecasting, Solver optimization, and elasticity sensitivity for Singapore's water security through 2060.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="card-footer-row">
        <span class="tag">Excel Solver</span>
        <span class="tag">Sensitivity</span>
        <a class="card-link" href="Projects/Spreadsheet Modelling for Decision Making/">View report →</a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Card 7 -->
    <div class="project-card">
      <div class="card-header-band"></div>
      <div class="card-body">
        <div class="card-category">Statistical Thinking</div>
        <div class="card-title">Healthcare and Population Ageing</div>
        <p class="card-desc">Correlation, regression, and hypothesis testing assess whether healthcare capacity has kept pace with ageing.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="card-footer-row">
        <span class="tag">Inference</span>
        <span class="tag">Regression</span>
        <a class="card-link" href="Projects/Statistical Thinking for Data Science/">View report →</a>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>

<hr class="section-divider">

<!-- ══════ SKILLS ══════ -->
<div class="section">
  <div class="section-title">Technical Skills</div>
  <div class="skills-grid">
    <div class="skill-group">
      <div class="skill-group-title">Languages</div>
      <div class="skill-tags">
        <span class="skill-tag">Python</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">R</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">SQL</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-group">
      <div class="skill-group-title">Machine Learning</div>
      <div class="skill-tags">
        <span class="skill-tag">Scikit-learn</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">XGBoost</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">PyTorch</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-group">
      <div class="skill-group-title">Visualisation</div>
      <div class="skill-tags">
        <span class="skill-tag">ggplot2</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">Plotly</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">Tableau</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="skill-group">
      <div class="skill-group-title">Tools & Platforms</div>
      <div class="skill-tags">
        <span class="skill-tag">Quarto</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">Git</span>
        <span class="skill-tag">Shiny</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```
